title: Distephanus antandroy

The classification further includes the division Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, and order Asterales. This plant is native to the island of Madagascar, where it can be found growing in the wild.

The plant has been reported to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues.
